terms.title: Terms of Cooperation
terms.subtitle: The following terms establish the framework for our professional collaboration, ensuring clarity and mutual understanding throughout our partnership.

content.0: I offer collaboration arrangements both as a remote freelancer (individual capacity) and as a registered business entity.
content.1: Multiple payment structures are available to accommodate your preferences: hourly rates, monthly retainers, or project-based pricing.
content.2: During the initial consultation phase, communication may include written correspondence (email, messaging platforms), video conferences, and in-person meetings as needed. For ongoing project work, written communication is the preferred method to ensure clarity and documentation.

services.title: 2. Services

provided.0: Services include: comprehensive content creation and management solutions across multiple platforms and formats.

not_provided.0: Services explicitly excluded: paid advertising management, standalone SEO consulting, and technical services outside the content domain (Google Ads, Meta Ads, and similar platforms).

services.combined_note: For projects requiring integrated content, graphic design, photography, or videography services, we can establish collaborative partnerships with specialized professionals. Please submit an inquiry through the Contact section to explore multi-disciplinary project possibilities.

content.0: Project timelines and delivery schedules are established during the initial project planning phase.
content.1: While we maintain strict adherence to agreed deadlines, unforeseen circumstances may occasionally require scope adjustments or expedited deliverables. Such modifications are subject to additional fees commensurate with the complexity and urgency of the required changes.

content.0: Payment options include credit card processing, direct bank transfer (with formal invoicing for business entities), and iDram electronic wallet transfers.
content.1: Advance payment policy: New partnerships require 50% advance payment for short-term or one-time projects before work commencement.
content.2: Established long-term partnerships may qualify for alternative payment arrangements, including post-completion billing options.

content.0: Unless otherwise specified in the initial agreement, modifications requested after project initiation that involve scope changes, deadline adjustments, or priority shifts will be subject to additional charges. Fees are determined based on the complexity and extent of the requested modifications.
All client information, brand materials, strategic discussions, and proprietary content remain strictly confidential throughout our collaboration and beyond project completion.
content.1: Formal Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) execution is available upon request for clients requiring additional legal documentation.

content.0: These terms may be updated periodically to reflect evolving business practices and industry standards.
content.1: All modifications will be published on this website section with appropriate notice.
content.2: Terms modifications will not affect existing client agreements established prior to the change, except in cases of regulatory requirements or circumstances beyond our control.

0.question: Do you work in narrow professional fields (e.g., medicine, legal field, IT)?
0.answer: Yes, I work with specialized industries when sufficient background materials and domain expertise are available. Initial consultations include detailed discussions of project requirements, target outcomes, and industry-specific considerations.

1.question: How often do you get in touch?
1.answer: I maintain regular business hours from 10:00/11:00-19:00 on weekdays and respond to communications within one business day. Emergency contact outside standard hours is reserved for urgent project needs only.

2.question: Do you work under contract?
2.answer: Yes, I accommodate various partnership structures including service agreements for individual clients and formal contracts for business entities. The specific arrangement can be tailored to meet your organizational requirements and preferences.

3.question: Do you work alone?
3.answer: While I personally handle all content creation and strategy, I can coordinate with additional specialists (designers, marketing professionals, product managers) when projects require expanded capabilities. Team assembly is managed on a project-specific basis.

4.question: Can you guarantee the quality of the content you write?
4.answer: Quality assurance is maintained through two key principles: professional content development standards and strict adherence to client specifications and brand requirements.

footer.text: All data on the website is protected.
